violations.text: The ceilings and ceiling vents in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

The (ceilings ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed paint chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per pIc work order was submitted. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
